2606.06357.title: F3-Tokenizer: Taming Audio Autoencoder Latents for Understanding and Generation
2606.06357.paper_summary: Continuous audio autoencoders reconstruct waveforms well but often produce latents with weak structure for understanding, while self-supervised audio encoders capture semantics but are not directly decodable. This mismatch complicates a single audio tokenizer that must support both understanding and generation. We adapt continuous autoencoder latents to this setting with two components: a noise-regularized autoencoder bottleneck and a latent-side representation encoder. The bottleneck uses channel normalization and stochastic perturbation instead of KL-based variational training, yielding scale-controlled continuous latents for reconstruction and autoregressive generation. The representation encoder is trained on frozen autoencoder latents with RQ-MTP and frozen-LLM supervision. The resulting tokenizer provides high-dimensional representations for understanding while preserving normalized continuous latents as generation targets
2606.06357.paper_summary_zh: 連續音頻自編碼器能夠良好地重建波形，但通常產生的潛在表示結構較弱，難以理解，而自我監督的音頻編碼器則能捕捉語義，但無法直接解碼。這種不匹配使得單一音頻標記器的設計變得複雜，因為它必須同時支持理解和生成。我們將連續自編碼器的潛在表示調整為這種設置，包含兩個組件：一個噪聲正則化的自編碼器瓶頸和一個潛在側表示編碼器。該瓶頸使用通道正則化和隨機擾動，而不是基於KL的變分訓練，從而產生可控尺度的連續潛在表示以進行重建和自回歸生成。表示編碼器則在凍結的自編碼器潛在表示上進行訓練，使用RQ-MTP和凍結的LLM監督。最終得到的標記器提供了高維度的表示以便於理解，同時保留了正規化的連續潛在表示作為生成目標。
2606.06357.author: Dinghao Zhou et.al.
2606.06357.authors: Dinghao Zhou, Xingchen Song, Di Wu, Pengyu Cheng, Shengfan Shen, Sixiang Lv
